name: That UFO Podcast
reason: Active UFO/UAP interview and news channel with recurring analysis.
channel_description: A range of guest interviews, up to date news, listener shows & deep dives into the UFO topic and related phenomena!

name: The Good Trouble Show with Matt Ford
reason: Investigative UAP coverage and interviews from Matt Ford.
channel_description:
The Good Trouble Show with Matt Ford delivers evidence-based UAP and UFO disclosure investigations rooted in Science and Technology. We move beyond the headlines with forensic analysis of declassified government files, Pentagon sensor data, and interviews with leading experts.

Host Matt Ford leads discussions with whistleblowers, aerospace engineers, and top journalists including Ross Coulthart, Luis "Lue" Elizondo, and Dr. Garry Nolan. This is your home for critical thinking and transparency on advanced aerospace technology and national security.

We're committed to uncovering the truth about Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena and the fight for disclosure — a community dedicated to facts, science, and government accountability.

▶️ START HERE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CupmP9L1fnY
📺 Full Investigations Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLYoWuVUieCBVbKsox9cFGg1vyL7CUObEj

🔔 New long-form investigations every Sunday at 1 PM PT.

name: WEAPONIZED Podcast Clips
reason: Official clips channel for WEAPONIZED investigative UAP interviews.
channel_description:
Official CLIPS channel for the WEAPONIZED Podcast. SUBSCRIBE for highlights!

In WEAPONIZED, Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp pull back the veil on the world of the known, to explore the unexplained. This multi-platform investigative series features exclusive interviews, never-before-seen footage, previously-suppressed documents, original audio and video recordings, and hard evidence related to UFOs, the paranormal, cutting-edge science, cover-ups, conspiracies, and big-time crimes. Original, groundbreaking conversations with government whistleblowers, spies, spooks, scientists, military officials, muckraking journalists, filmmakers, historians, artists, musicians, and major celebrities will cast a wide shadow through the other-world… and detail the human experiences that inform these extraordinary phenomena. Your curiosity will be WEAPONIZED.

name: Lue Elizondo
reason: Official channel from a major UAP public figure and source of direct updates.

name: Mick West
reason: Skeptical UAP analysis channel useful for cross-checking claims.
channel_description:
I'm Mick West, skeptic, writer, UFO investigator, and former video game programmer. This is the official channel for videos relating to the debunking and other experiments I do on my forum MetaBunk.org. It's also where I post the video of my Podcast - Tales From the Rabbit Hole (tftrh.com) which focuses on long-form discussions with people whose lives have been affected by conspiracy theories. 
My primary focus is on conspiracy theories. I investigate claims of evidence around those theories, covering everything: 9/11, UFOs, False Flags, Chemtrails, and even Flat Earth. I also discuss how best to help people who have fallen down the conspiracy theory rabbit hole, a topic I explore in my book: Escaping the Rabbit Hole - How to Debunk Conspiracy Theories using Facts, Logic, and Respect.
Twitter: https://twitter.com/mickwest
Email: mick@mickwest.com

name: Stellar Productions / Need To Know
reason: Need To Know UAP discussion hosted by Bryce Zabel.
channel_description:
Stellar Productions is a Los Angeles-based production company run by WGA Award-winning writer/producers Bryce Zabel and Jackie Zabel. 

Sound, Light & Frequency is our current 36-episode immersive journey that asks: what if Hollywood hasn’t just imagined UFOs — but has been part of a deeper, decades-long conversation about them? 

Need to Know is Bryce Zabel’s ongoing UFO/UAP news and analysis series with historian and author Richard Dolan. 

Our current production slate includes the feature film The Last Battle, being produced with Endurance Media, as well as the scripted podcast Undeniable, being produced with Lionsgate Television. Bryce has also authored three books that serve as rich intellectual property for potential adaptation into television series, podcasts, and feature films.

name: Podcast UFO
reason: Recurring UFO/UAP live shows, interviews, headline roundups, and community analysis.
channel_description:
Catch Podcast UFO live on YouTube—Tuesdays at 8:00 PM ET and sometimes on Thursdays at 8:00 PM ET!

Podcast UFO is your destination for captivating discussions on UFOs, close encounters, and the people at the heart of these mysteries. Hear eyewitness accounts, expert insights, and deep dives into sightings, cover-ups, and government secrecy.

Want to be part of the conversation? Visit podcastufo.com to learn how to get involved.

Subscribe and join us on the journey into the unknown!
